category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-edit is a utility for managing cargo dependencies from the command line.
source_facts.executables lists dependency-editing commands such as cargo-add, cargo-rm, cargo-upgrade, and cargo-set-version.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official killercup/cargo-edit repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official cargo-edit documentation/project site.
source_facts.repo identifies killercup/cargo-edit as the official source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/killercup/cargo-edit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly says it manages cargo dependencies from the command line.
source_facts.executables lists cargo-add, cargo-rm, cargo-set-version, and cargo-upgrade.
